examples: So this should immediately look like a problem because we know, in fact, that methane is tetravalent, and this is telling us it's only divalent.
A tetravalent meningococcal meningitis vaccine (licensed in the United States) and a heptavalent vaccine protecting against meningitis A and C (to be licensed in 2007);
Conclusion the developed synthetic medium and purification procedure were feasible and provided an experimental basis for the preparation of tetravalent meningococcus polysaccharide vaccine.
